heading: Flag Day
label: 110 Flag Day

children.text: calling on United States Government officials to display the flag of the United States on all Government buildings on Flag Day; and

urging the people of the United States to observe Flag Day as the anniversary of the adoption on , by the Continental Congress of the Stars and Stripes as the official flag of the United States.June 14, 1777
